regimeNotes: NEUTRAL regime maintained 2026-06-28 (Sunday). Markets closed — equity prices carry over from Friday June 26 close. Crypto slightly weaker overnight: BTC $60,113 (-0.38% 24h), ETH $1,575.67 (-0.31%), SOL $71.33 (-0.61%). Fear and Greed 18 (Extreme Fear, persistent for 2+ weeks). BTC dominance 55.85% (stable). Total crypto mcap $2.16T (-0.44% 24h). 10Y Treasury yield 4.40% (essentially flat). DXY ~101.5 (still elevated, strong USD remains a headwind for risk assets). EURUSD 1.1380. University of Michigan Consumer Sentiment at record low (Iran war / cost of living impact). S&P 500 breadth improving even on down days — rotation out of tech into other sectors. Analysts project 25% full-year 2026 S&P 500 EPS growth. Falling crude oil prices reduce CPI/PCE inflation pressure (positive macro tail). Key data upcoming: June 30 consumer confidence + JOLTS; July 3 jobs report. Crypto sleeve 19.24% of NAV (tight but within 20% neutral-cap — no room to add crypto). Cash 14.06% of NAV. No trades: all theses intact above invalidation levels; no clear edge for new entries on a Sunday no-data day; hold dry powder for June 30 / July jobs data to clarify regime.

SPY.thesis: Core US equity beta at $728.99 (below $741.75 avgCost; -1.72%). Broad index resilient; market breadth improving with sector rotation as positive development. Hold as diversified US equity anchor. Key catalysts: June 30 consumer confidence + JOLTS, July jobs report.
SPY.invalidationLevel: Sustained close below 660 USD or confirmed multi-hike path forcing a technical downtrend in the broad index.

NVDA.thesis: AI/compute secular leader at $192.53 (below $208.44 avgCost; -7.63%). AI capex cycle and data-center demand intact; breadth rotation slightly away from tech short-term but secular thesis unbroken. Hold through volatility; monitor AI demand commentary at earnings.
NVDA.invalidationLevel: AI capex digestion or data-center demand rollover; close below 150 USD.

MSFT.thesis: Quality AI/cloud compounder at $372.97 (below $391.98 avgCost; -4.85%). Azure + Copilot growth intact; Michael Burry disclosed large long call positions. Rotation from tech may create short-term pressure but durable earnings compounder. HOLD.
MSFT.invalidationLevel: Cloud growth deceleration or AI capex without demonstrable ROI; close below 340 USD.

GOOGL.thesis: Quality growth (search + cloud + AI) at $337.39 (below $366.53 avgCost; -7.96%). Search monopoly and cloud revenue dominant. Watching distance to $310 invalidation carefully — down ~7.96% from cost. Thesis intact but monitor AI search competition.
GOOGL.invalidationLevel: Search share erosion to AI rivals causing revenue decline; close below 310 USD.

UNH.thesis: Defensive value at $427.89 (above $408.52 avgCost; +4.73%, ~6.55% NAV). Healthcare defensives providing portfolio ballast during rate-hike fears; serves as natural risk hedge. HOLD.
UNH.invalidationLevel: Further regulatory or medical-cost shock; close below 360 USD.

GLD.thesis: Tail/debasement hedge at $373.63 (below $386.54 avgCost; -3.34%, ~4.30% NAV). Yield softening from PCE data is a tailwind; geopolitical risk (Iran) still supportive. Small position limits NAV drag while providing asymmetric upside in risk-off scenario. HOLD.
GLD.invalidationLevel: Real yields spike with strong USD reversal sustained; close below 350 USD.

BTC.thesis: Core crypto sleeve leader at $60,113 (below $64,629 avgCost; -6.99%, ~14.05% NAV). F&G 18 (Extreme Fear) is historically contrarian bullish; BTC dominance 55.85% stable. Crypto sleeve at 19.24% — near 20% neutral cap, cannot add without breach. Hold; await risk-on regime or F&G improvement for deployment.

ETH.thesis: Discounted L1 leader at $1,575.67 (below $1,667.47 avgCost; -5.51%, ~3.94% NAV). ETH recovering alongside BTC in Extreme Fear environment. Asymmetric upside when risk-on returns and crypto sleeve cap expands to 35%. Small position appropriate.
ETH.invalidationLevel: Structural loss of share to L1 rivals; close below 1,300 USD.

SOL.thesis: High-beta satellite at $71.33 (above $67.81 avgCost; +5.18%, ~1.25% NAV). Small position to capture upside when regime flips to risk-on and crypto sleeve cap expands. Overnight weakness modest (-0.61%). HOLD small position.
SOL.invalidationLevel: Break below 52 USD; network deterioration or sentiment collapse.
